creator: dan@obluda.cz
text:
On 06/04/10 00:35, Joseph S. Atkinson:
> I cannot duplicate this problem.

> What options or knobs are you using to build the port? Gettext should be
> controlled by the NLS knob.

Complete list of knobs:
  ------------------------
-DWITHOUT_X11 -DWITHOUT_SKINS -DWITHOUT_QT4 -DWITHOUT_GNOMEVFS 
-DWITHOUT_SAMBA -DWITHOUT_MATROSKA -DWITH_LIVEMEDIA 
WITH_OPENSSL_PORT=yes -DWITHOUT_OPENSSL_BASE PACKAGE_BUILDING=1 
-DNOPORTDOCS -DNOPORTEXAMPLES OPTIONSFILE=/dev/null
  ------------------------

No other "hidden" knobs in make.conf nor within OPTIONSFILE (which is 
/dev/null)

But I did another /usr/port's 'make update' in meantime and now I'm 
unable to reproduce problem as well.

I'm pretty sure I compiled the VLC from fresh port's tree just before I 
filled the PR. I'm pretty sure the ldd declared vlc's dependency to 
libintl, but no dependency to gettext has been recorded in +CONTENTS

I have no idea where has been the problem, but it disappeared. Please 
close the PR and excuse me for wasting your's time.

Dan
